name: CastRecall
description: Turn podcast listening into retrievable memory: sync Pocket Casts listen history (read-only), fetch or generate episode transcripts, store them privately with provenance, and create approval-gated review candidates. Never writes to durable memory itself.

dataDir.description: Where CastRecall stores transcripts and review candidates. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/castrecall. The CASTRECALL_DATA_DIR env var overrides this.

historyLimit.description: Max history entries ingested per sync (default 100).

sttEnabled.description: Explicitly enable the paid speech-to-text fallback (default false; it costs money per episode).

sttProvider.description: Speech-to-text provider when sttEnabled is true (default assemblyai).
